Thanks for taking the time to submit a new resource to the Awesome Snapmaker List!
**Please REPLACE the placeholder text below the headers with your own details.** Once submitted, our automated bot will generate a Pull Request!

### Resource Title
e.g. Custom Quick Change Toolhead

### Author Name
(Your name or username)

### Author Link
(Link to author's profile on GitHub, Thingiverse, Forum, etc.)

### Content Link (Original URL)
https://...

### Difficulty Level
(Beginner / Intermediate / Advanced / N/A)

### Cost
(Free / Paid / Freemium / N/A)

### Machine Type(s)
(SM_2.0, Artisan, U1, J1, RAY, Universal - Comma separated if multiple)

### Machine Tool Type(s)
(FDM, LASER, CNC, ROTARY, COMBINED - Comma separated if multiple)

### Record Type(s)
(Watch, Discuss, Read, Download, Shop - Comma separated if multiple)

### Free Tags
(Comma-separated tags e.g. OFFICIAL, UNOFFICIAL, enclosure, cooling)

### Extra Button 1 - Label
(Optional) Download STL
